name: polaris-dashboard
description: Polaris web control plane - dashboard pillar (Drive and future apps).
author: FJRG2007 <fjrg2007@tpeoficial.com>

scripts.build: npm run build -w @polaris/config && npm run build -w @polaris/core && npm run build -w @polaris/db && npm run build -w @polaris/auth && npm run build -w @polaris/hostd-client && npm run build -w @polaris/ssh && npm run build -w @polaris/storage && npm run build -w @polaris/docker && npm run build -w @polaris/web
